name: Coralogix
description: Coralogix log analytics and monitoring platform

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Coralogix
2. Settings → API Access
3. Copy the Alerts, Rules and Tags API Key
4. Enter your region endpoint (default: api.coralogix.com)

credentialFields.label: Alerts API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Coralogix → Settings → API Access → Alerts, Rules and Tags API Key

credentialFields.label: Region Endpoint
credentialFields.helpText: Your region API host. Examples: api.coralogix.com (US), api.eu2.coralogix.com (EU), api.coralogixsg.com (AP)

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies Coralogix has active alerts configured
